1100011101011110 1011001000110110 1 -> sum: 0111100110010101, cout: 1

0010011110101100 0011111011010000 0 -> sum: 0110011001111100, cout: 0

0110100110011100 0111000101010110 1 -> sum: 1101101011110011, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
